TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Hamad bin Isa bin Salman Al Khalifa = Mntucing hngkawas 1950 idas 1 jiyax 28 ka Hamad bin Isa bin Salman Al Khalifa ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Bahrain ta sayang o kiya ka Hamad bin Isa bin Salman Al Khalifa, pnaah hngkawas 1999 idas 3 jiyax 6 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Seho Hamayto.Pun.Isa.Pun.Sroman.Aroharihwa(kari Arapo: ,Knkawas1950 idas 1 ali 28-), KCMG we heya ka kowang saya ka Paring wangko(prading kndalax knkawas 2002). Heya we laqi na berah Paring wangko ka Aymiar-isa.Pun.Saroman.Aroharihwa, knkawas 1999, mhuqil ka tama na, ma, heya ka rmirih mgAymir, kndalax knkawas 2002 de, pryuxun na mesa kowang di. Kndusan na Sriso Hamayto nii ge, knkawas 1950 idas 1 ali 28 we, mntuting quri hunac na tunux alang Maynamay ka Rihuwa. Riso hari de, malix muuyas sapah pyasan Raysu kawcong nInko-cencyaw. Bobo na, musa muuyas Hwancya-cunsu seyen nInko ka Santohosuto ma, musa muuyas cunsu-seyen nDame ka Raywunwosupaw dungan. Meyah alang de, pheyu supi nParing-kwohwangcin ka Hamayto. Knkawas 1964, tama na ge, heya ka mpstange mmaha kowang, bobo na de, heya ka mpdudul ucwang-putwe nParing. Knkawas 1971, wada na pdlaxan ka qlhangan Inkwo ma, turi di, Hamayto de kwohwang-tacun ka heya. Qmlahang Knkawas 1999 idas 3 ali 6, wada mhuqil tama na Hamayto ka Isa-Aymiar, ma, Hamayto ka smriyux tloong tloongan kwowang, heya ka tgdaha kwowang nParing-kwo, ma, heya na ka tgbaro bale mdudul Paring kwohwang-cun ma, mpdudul supi bale. Heya ka tloong tloongan kwowang de, lmutuc naq qqlahang na ka Hamayto kwowang, kika qtaan ka ndaan na qmlahang. Hamayto nii ge, egu bale qpryuxan na ka cencu-ringyu, kana so snuwa ka qnnaqah na kesun cencuhwan, biqun na beyax psgao pheyu qbsuran ka mqedil, ma, pooda yihwe-senci. Snuwa na qnnaqah kesun taso we, qrasun riyung laalang ka Hamayto, knryuxan na kesun " rencen riso-sing suci ".
S.PHON: = ńßamad bin isa bin salman al kńßali*a = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** ka ńßamad bin isa bin salman al kńßali*a ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan bańß…ĺain ta sajaŇč o kija ka ńßamad bin isa bin salman al kńßali*a, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. s…ôńßo ńßamajto.pun.isa.pun.s…ĺoman.a…ĺońßa…ĺińßwa(ka…ĺi a…ĺapo: ,knkawas**** idas * ali **-), k ¶mg w…ô ńß…ôa ka kowaŇč saja ka pa…ĺiŇč waŇčko(p…ĺadiŇč kndalax knkawas ****). ńß…ôa w…ô laqi na b…ô…ĺańß pa…ĺiŇč waŇčko ka ajmia…ĺ-isa.pun.sa…ĺoman.a…ĺońßa…ĺińßwa, knkawas ****, mńßuqil ka tama na, ma, ńß…ôa ka …ĺmi…ĺińß mgajmi…ĺ, kndalax knkawas **** d…ô, p…ĺjuxun na m…ôsa kowaŇč di. kndusan na s…ĺiso ńßamajto nii g…ô, knkawas **** idas * ali ** w…ô, mntutiŇč qu…ĺi ńßuna ¶ na tunux alaŇč majnamaj ka …ĺińßuwa. …ĺiso ńßa…ĺi d…ô, malix muujas sapańß pjasan …ĺajsu kaw ¶oŇč ninko- ¶…ôn ¶jaw. bobo na, musa muujas ńßwan ¶ja- ¶unsu s…ô…ôn ninko ka santońßosuto ma, musa muujas ¶unsu-s…ô…ôn ndam…ô ka …ĺajwunwosupaw duŇčan. m…ôańß alaŇč d…ô, pńß…ôu supi npa…ĺiŇč-kwońßwaŇč ¶in ka ńßamajto. knkawas ****, tama na g…ô, ńß…ôa ka mpstaŇč…ô mmańßa kowaŇč, bobo na d…ô, ńß…ôa ka mpdudul u ¶waŇč-putw…ô npa…ĺiŇč. knkawas ****, wada na pdlaxan ka qlńßaŇčan inkwo ma, tu…ĺi di, ńßamajto d…ô kwońßwaŇč-ta ¶un ka ńß…ôa. qmlańßaŇč knkawas **** idas * ali *, wada mńßuqil tama na ńßamajto ka isa-ajmia…ĺ, ma, ńßamajto ka sm…ĺijux tlooŇč tlooŇčan kwowaŇč, ńß…ôa ka tgdańßa kwowaŇč npa…ĺiŇč-kwo, ma, ńß…ôa na ka tgba…ĺo bal…ô mdudul pa…ĺiŇč kwońßwaŇč- ¶un ma, mpdudul supi bal…ô. ńß…ôa ka tlooŇč tlooŇčan kwowaŇč d…ô, lmutu ¶ naq qqlańßaŇč na ka ńßamajto kwowaŇč, kika qtaan ka ndaan na qmlańßaŇč. ńßamajto nii g…ô, …ôgu bal…ô qp…ĺjuxan na ka ¶…ôn ¶u-…ĺiŇčju, kana so snuwa ka qnnaqańß na k…ôsun ¶…ôn ¶uńßwan, biqun na b…ôax psgao pńß…ôu qbsu…ĺan ka mq…ôdil, ma, pooda jińßw…ô-s…ôn ¶i. snuwa na qnnaqańß k…ôsun taso w…ô, q…ĺasun …ĺijuŇč laalaŇč ka ńßamajto, kn…ĺjuxan na k…ôsun " …ĺ…ôn ¶…ôn …ĺiso-siŇč su ¶i ".
S.FORM: = Hamad bin Isa bin Salman Al Khalifa = Mntucing hngkawas 1950 idas 1 jiyax 28 ka Hamad bin Isa bin Salman Al Khalifa ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Bahrain ta sayang o kiya ka Hamad bin Isa bin Salman Al Khalifa, pnaah hngkawas 1999 idas 3 jiyax 6 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Seho Hamayto.Pun.Isa.Pun.Sroman.Aroharihwa(kari Arapo: ,Knkawas1950 idas 1 ali 28-), KCMG we heya ka kowang saya ka Paring wangko(prading kndalax knkawas 2002). Heya we laqi na berah Paring wangko ka Aymiar-isa.Pun.Saroman.Aroharihwa, knkawas 1999, mhuqil ka tama na, ma, heya ka rmirih mgAymir, kndalax knkawas 2002 de, pryuxun na mesa kowang di. Kndusan na Sriso Hamayto nii ge, knkawas 1950 idas 1 ali 28 we, mntuting quri hunac na tunux alang Maynamay ka Rihuwa. Riso hari de, malix muuyas sapah pyasan Raysu kawcong nInko-cencyaw. Bobo na, musa muuyas Hwancya-cunsu seyen nInko ka Santohosuto ma, musa muuyas cunsu-seyen nDame ka Raywunwosupaw dungan. Meyah alang de, pheyu supi nParing-kwohwangcin ka Hamayto. Knkawas 1964, tama na ge, heya ka mpstange mmaha kowang, bobo na de, heya ka mpdudul ucwang-putwe nParing. Knkawas 1971, wada na pdlaxan ka qlhangan Inkwo ma, turi di, Hamayto de kwohwang-tacun ka heya. Qmlahang Knkawas 1999 idas 3 ali 6, wada mhuqil tama na Hamayto ka Isa-Aymiar, ma, Hamayto ka smriyux tloong tloongan kwowang, heya ka tgdaha kwowang nParing-kwo, ma, heya na ka tgbaro bale mdudul Paring kwohwang-cun ma, mpdudul supi bale. Heya ka tloong tloongan kwowang de, lmutuc naq qqlahang na ka Hamayto kwowang, kika qtaan ka ndaan na qmlahang. Hamayto nii ge, egu bale qpryuxan na ka cencu-ringyu, kana so snuwa ka qnnaqah na kesun cencuhwan, biqun na beyax psgao pheyu qbsuran ka mqedil, ma, pooda yihwe-senci. Snuwa na qnnaqah kesun taso we, qrasun riyung laalang ka Hamayto, knryuxan na kesun " rencen riso-sing suci ".
